all.en: Rachel adjusted the microphone and looked nervously at the judges sitting in the front row.
all.zh: 瑞秋調整麥克風，緊張地看著坐在前排的評審。

all.en: Her science fair project explored how different liquids affected plant growth over time.
all.zh: 她的科學展專題探討了不同液體如何隨時間影響植物的生長。

all.en: She had spent eight weeks watering identical plants with water, milk, juice, and soda.
all.zh: 她花了八週時間用水、牛奶、果汁和汽水澆灌相同的植物。

all.en: On her display board, photographs showed the dramatic differences in each plant's health.
all.zh: 在她的展示板上，照片顯示了每株植物健康狀況的巨大差異。

all.en: Rachel explained that the water plant grew the tallest with bright green leaves.
all.zh: 瑞秋解釋說澆水的植物長得最高，葉子鮮綠。

all.en: The plant given soda, however, withered and turned brown within just two weeks.
all.zh: 然而，被澆汽水的植物在短短兩週內就枯萎並變成褐色。

all.en: She presented a colorful graph showing the daily growth measurements in centimeters.
all.zh: 她展示了一張色彩鮮豔的圖表，顯示以公分為單位的每日生長測量值。

all.en: The judges nodded with approval, impressed by her detailed observations and notes.
all.zh: 評審們贊同地點頭，對她詳細的觀察和筆記印象深刻。

all.en: One judge asked her why she thought sugar caused such severe damage to the plants.
all.zh: 一位評審問她為什麼認為糖對植物造成如此嚴重的傷害。

all.en: Rachel confidently answered that high sugar concentrations prevented proper water absorption.
all.zh: 瑞秋自信地回答，高糖濃度阻止了植物正常吸收水分。

all.en: When the results were announced later, Rachel won second place and felt incredibly proud.
all.zh: 當稍後公布結果時，瑞秋獲得了第二名，感到無比自豪。

all.en: After the ceremony, Rachel's parents hugged her tightly and took dozens of celebration photos.
all.zh: 頒獎典禮後，瑞秋的父母緊緊地擁抱她，拍了數十張慶祝照片。

all.en: Her science teacher, Mr. Park, approached and suggested she enter the regional competition.
all.zh: 她的科學老師朴老師走過來，建議她參加區域競賽。

all.en: Rachel felt nervous but excited about the chance to compete at a higher level.
all.zh: 瑞秋感到緊張卻又興奮，能有機會在更高層級的比賽中競爭。

all.en: That weekend, she expanded her experiment by testing additional liquids, including coconut water.
all.zh: 那個週末，她擴展實驗，測試了更多液體，包括椰子水。

all.en: She updated her colorful graph with the latest measurements and added new photographs.
all.zh: 她用最新的測量數據更新了彩色圖表，並加入了新的照片。

all.en: Her younger brother helped by labeling each pot with neat handwriting and colored stickers.
all.zh: 她的弟弟幫忙在每個花盆上用工整的筆跡和彩色貼紙做標記。

all.en: Mr. Park reviewed her improved poster and offered helpful suggestions about scientific wording.
all.zh: 朴老師檢視了她改良後的海報，並針對科學用語提供了有用的建議。

all.en: At the regional fair, Rachel met students from many different schools and made new friends.
all.zh: 在區域科展上，瑞秋認識了來自許多不同學校的學生，並交了新朋友。

all.en: She delivered her presentation more confidently this time, even cracking a small joke.
all.zh: 這一次她更有自信地完成簡報，甚至開了一個小玩笑。

all.en: Although she did not win first place, Rachel knew this experience had changed her future.
all.zh: 雖然她沒有獲得第一名，瑞秋知道這次經歷已改變了她的未來。

all.en: Back at school the following Monday, Rachel shared her regional fair experiences with her classmates.
all.zh: 接下來的星期一回到學校，瑞秋與同學們分享她在區域科展的經歷。

all.en: Several younger students approached her, asking for advice on their own upcoming projects.
all.zh: 幾位低年級的學生走向她，請教關於他們自己即將進行的專題的建議。

all.en: Rachel happily volunteered to mentor three of them during her free periods each week.
all.zh: 瑞秋愉快地自願在每週空堂時間指導其中三位學生。

all.en: Her mentees worked on diverse projects including solar energy, water filtration, and plant biology.
all.zh: 她指導的學生們進行了多元的專題，包括太陽能、水質過濾和植物生物學。

all.en: Rachel taught them how to organize their observations clearly and use scientific vocabulary correctly.
all.zh: 瑞秋教他們如何清楚地整理觀察結果，並正確使用科學詞彙。

all.en: Mr. Park praised her leadership and asked her to give a short speech at the school assembly.
all.zh: 朴老師讚揚她的領導力，並請她在學校朝會上發表一段簡短演講。

all.en: Rachel spoke about how curiosity and patience could transform anyone into a young scientist.
all.zh: 瑞秋談到好奇心和耐心如何能讓任何人轉變成一位年輕的科學家。

all.en: The entire student body applauded warmly, and many students felt newly inspired by her words.
all.zh: 全體學生熱烈鼓掌，許多人因她的話受到全新的啟發。

all.en: By the end of the school year, Rachel had decided to pursue biology as her future career.
all.zh: 到了學年結束時，瑞秋已決定將生物學作為她未來的職業方向。

all.en: She wrote in her journal that science had become both her passion and her purpose in life.
all.zh: 她在日記裡寫下，科學已經成為她人生的熱情與目標。

all.en: The following summer, Rachel attended a youth science camp held at a prestigious nearby university.
all.zh: 隔年暑假，瑞秋參加了一個在附近知名大學舉辦的青年科學營。

all.en: She met other passionate young students from many different cities and exchanged ideas every evening.
all.zh: 她認識了許多來自不同城市充滿熱情的年輕學生，每天傍晚都互相交流想法。

all.en: The professors taught them how to design experiments using more advanced equipment and methods.
all.zh: 教授們教他們如何使用更先進的設備和方法來設計實驗。

all.en: Rachel especially enjoyed working inside a real biology laboratory with microscopes and test tubes.
all.zh: 瑞秋特別喜歡在真正的生物實驗室裡，使用顯微鏡和試管工作。

all.en: She started a new research project investigating how music affected the growth of small bean plants.
all.zh: 她開始了一個新的研究專題，探討音樂如何影響小型豆類植物的生長。

all.en: By the end of the camp, her project earned a special recognition from the head professor.
all.zh: 營隊結束時，她的專題獲得了主任教授的特別表揚。

all.en: He encouraged her to submit her findings to a national youth science journal for publication.
all.zh: 他鼓勵她把研究結果投稿到全國青年科學期刊上發表。

all.en: Rachel revised her report carefully over many evenings with help from her supportive science teacher.
all.zh: 瑞秋在許多個夜晚仔細修改報告，並得到了支持她的科學老師的幫助。

all.en: Three months later, the journal accepted her article and printed her photograph on the cover.
all.zh: 三個月後，期刊接受了她的文章，並把她的照片印在封面上。

all.en: Rachel knew her journey as a young scientist had only just begun and felt incredibly grateful.
all.zh: 瑞秋明白她作為年輕科學家的旅程才剛開始，並感到無比感激。

all.en: After her article appeared in the journal, Rachel received emails from young scientists around the world.
all.zh: 她的文章刊登在期刊後，瑞秋收到了來自世界各地年輕科學家的電子郵件。

all.en: She replied to each message thoughtfully and shared advice about starting independent research projects.
all.zh: 她認真地回覆每一封訊息，並分享開始獨立研究專題的建議。

all.en: A research foundation invited her to attend an international youth conference held in Singapore.
all.zh: 一個研究基金會邀請她參加在新加坡舉辦的國際青年大會。

all.en: Rachel boarded her first international flight with a notebook full of curious scientific questions.
all.zh: 瑞秋帶著一本寫滿好奇科學問題的筆記本，搭上她人生第一次的國際航班。

all.en: At the conference, she presented her bean plant music experiment to a hall of impressed researchers.
all.zh: 在大會上，她向一整廳印象深刻的研究員們展示了她的豆子植物音樂實驗。

all.en: Several professors offered her future internship opportunities at their universities and research institutes.
all.zh: 幾位教授為她提供了未來在他們的大學和研究機構實習的機會。

all.en: Rachel made friends with students from Korea, Brazil, Germany, and many other distant countries.
all.zh: 瑞秋結交了來自韓國、巴西、德國和其他許多遙遠國家的學生朋友。

all.en: On her final evening, she watched the city lights glow brightly from the top of a tall hotel.
all.zh: 在她的最後一個傍晚，她從一座高樓飯店的頂層望著城市燈火明亮閃爍。

all.en: She wrote in her journal that science had opened doors she once thought were forever closed.
all.zh: 她在日記裡寫下，科學打開了她曾以為永遠關閉的大門。

all.en: Rachel returned home determined to inspire even more young minds to discover their own scientific passions.
all.zh: 瑞秋帶著決心回家，要啟發更多年輕的心靈發掘他們自己的科學熱情。

all.en: Back home, Rachel began organizing weekend science workshops at her old elementary school every other Saturday.
all.zh: 回到家後，瑞秋開始每隔一個週六，在她從前就讀的小學舉辦週末科學工作坊。

all.en: She designed simple experiments using kitchen ingredients to make scientific ideas easy and exciting.
all.zh: 她設計了利用廚房食材的簡單實驗，讓科學概念變得既容易又有趣。

all.en: Twenty children attended the very first workshop, eagerly mixing baking soda with vinegar to make small eruptions.
all.zh: 第一場工作坊有二十位孩子參加，興奮地把小蘇打和醋混合製造出小小的噴發。

all.en: Rachel's parents proudly photographed every workshop and helped manage the snack table during long sessions.
all.zh: 瑞秋的爸媽自豪地為每場工作坊拍照，並在長時間的活動中幫忙管理點心桌。

all.en: A local newspaper feature called her workshops the most welcoming science classroom in the entire neighborhood.
all.zh: 當地報紙專題稱她的工作坊為整個社區裡最溫暖友善的科學教室。

all.en: Rachel began inviting her international friends to send short video greetings to the children every weekend.
all.zh: 瑞秋開始邀請她的國際朋友每個週末送來短短的問候影片給孩子們。

all.en: The children loved learning small science words in Korean, Portuguese, and German alongside their fun experiments.
all.zh: 孩子們很喜歡一邊做有趣的實驗，一邊學韓文、葡萄牙文和德文中的小小科學單字。

all.en: By the end of the year, Rachel had hosted forty workshops and inspired six children to attend science camps.
all.zh: 到了年底，瑞秋已經舉辦了四十場工作坊，並啟發六位孩子去報名科學營。

all.en: Her old elementary school named a small classroom The Curiosity Lab in honor of her growing impact.
all.zh: 她的母校把一間小教室命名為「好奇心實驗室」，以表揚她日益擴大的影響力。

all.en: Rachel cried happy tears at the dedication ceremony, knowing one science fair had reshaped countless young dreams.
all.zh: 在命名儀式上，瑞秋流下了喜悅的淚水，明白一場科學展已改變了無數個年輕的夢想。

all.en: The Curiosity Lab soon attracted teachers from neighboring districts who wanted to learn Rachel's workshop methods.
all.zh: 好奇心實驗室很快吸引了鄰近學區的老師，他們想學習瑞秋的工作坊方法。

all.en: She prepared a detailed handbook with step-by-step instructions and printable worksheets for every experiment.
all.zh: 她準備了一本詳盡的手冊，附有每個實驗的逐步說明和可列印的學習單。

all.en: A small publishing company offered to print the handbook and distribute copies across the entire province.
all.zh: 一家小型出版社主動提出印製這本手冊，並將其分發到整個省內各地。

all.en: Rachel donated all royalties to a fund that bought science kits for schools in low-income communities.
all.zh: 瑞秋把所有版稅捐給一個基金會，用來為低收入社區的學校購買科學實驗包。

all.en: Within six months, more than three hundred classrooms were using her handbook in their weekly lessons.
all.zh: 六個月內，超過三百間教室開始在每週的課程中使用她的手冊。

all.en: A regional television channel invited her to host a short Saturday morning program about home science.
all.zh: 一家區域電視台邀請她主持一個星期六早晨關於居家科學的短節目。

all.en: Rachel agreed only after ensuring that every episode would feature young guests from local schools.
all.zh: 瑞秋只在確保每一集都會邀請當地學校的年輕來賓參與後才答應。

all.en: The first episode aired to enthusiastic reviews, with families recreating her plant experiment in their homes.
all.zh: 第一集播出後獲得熱烈好評，許多家庭在家中重現了她的植物實驗。

all.en: Letters poured in from grateful parents, thanking Rachel for making science feel friendly and approachable.
all.zh: 感謝信如雪片般湧入，家長們感謝瑞秋讓科學變得親切且容易親近。

all.en: Rachel kept every letter in a wooden box, calling it the most precious reward of her entire journey.
all.zh: 瑞秋把每一封信收在一個木盒裡，稱它為她整段旅程中最珍貴的獎勵。

all.en: The following summer, Rachel partnered with a national charity to bring science kits to remote mountain schools.
all.zh: 隔年夏天，瑞秋與一個全國性慈善機構合作，把科學實驗包送到偏遠的山區學校。

all.en: She traveled along winding country roads, visiting eight tiny villages and meeting curious children at each stop.
all.zh: 她沿著蜿蜒的鄉間道路前行，造訪了八個小山村，並在每一站遇見充滿好奇的孩子。

all.en: Many of those children had never seen a real microscope before her workshops arrived in their classrooms.
all.zh: 其中許多孩子在她的工作坊抵達教室前，從未親眼見過真正的顯微鏡。

all.en: Rachel taught them how to examine leaves, flower petals, and tiny grains of soil in glowing detail.
all.zh: 瑞秋教他們如何在閃亮的細節中觀察葉子、花瓣以及微小的土壤顆粒。

all.en: A small girl named Mei whispered that she now dreamed of becoming a biologist one bright day.
all.zh: 一位叫梅的小女孩輕聲說，她現在夢想著有一天能成為一位生物學家。

all.en: Rachel gave Mei her own spare notebook so she could record observations from the surrounding mountain forests.
all.zh: 瑞秋把自己備用的筆記本送給梅，讓她可以記錄周圍山林的觀察結果。

all.en: Several months later, Mei sent Rachel a packet of careful drawings showing twenty different local wildflowers.
all.zh: 幾個月後，梅寄給瑞秋一疊細心繪製的圖畫，描繪了二十種當地不同的野花。

all.en: Rachel framed three of the drawings and hung them proudly in the entrance of the Curiosity Lab.
all.zh: 瑞秋把其中三幅圖畫裱框，自豪地掛在好奇心實驗室的入口處。

all.en: Visiting teachers always paused to admire them, and Rachel happily shared Mei's inspiring story with everyone.
all.zh: 來訪的老師總會停下來欣賞，而瑞秋總是開心地與每個人分享梅那激勵人心的故事。

all.en: Rachel realized that every quiet seed of curiosity could grow into something far brighter than she had ever imagined.
all.zh: 瑞秋明白了，每一顆安靜的好奇種子，都能長成比她想像中更加燦爛的事物。

all.en: On the long bus ride back from the last mountain village, Rachel realized she had eaten nothing but instant noodles for three straight days.
all.zh: 從最後一個山村搭巴士回程的漫長路上，瑞秋才驚覺她已經連續三天只吃泡麵。

all.en: Her mother surprised her at the station with a hot lunch box and a tiny pot of newly sprouted basil leaves.
all.zh: 媽媽在車站給她驚喜，帶來熱便當和一小盆剛冒芽的羅勒。

all.en: Rachel hugged her mother for an extra long moment, suddenly understanding how tired the road had really made her.
all.zh: 瑞秋特別長地擁抱了媽媽，突然才明白這趟旅程到底有多累人。

all.en: Mei mailed Rachel a small dried wildflower pressed inside a handwritten letter, along with her latest mountain forest sketches.
all.zh: 梅寄了一朵壓在親筆信裡的乾燥野花給瑞秋，附上她最新的山林素描。

all.en: Rachel pressed the wildflower carefully between two glass slides and placed it under a microscope for the next workshop demonstration.
all.zh: 瑞秋小心地把那朵野花壓在兩片玻璃載片之間，放到顯微鏡下作為下次工作坊的示範樣本。

all.en: The children gasped softly when they saw the delicate purple veins running through every petal at high magnification.
all.zh: 孩子們在高倍率下看到每片花瓣裡細緻的紫色脈絡時，輕輕地發出了驚嘆聲。

all.en: Mr. Park visited the Curiosity Lab to see Rachel's latest setup and stayed for nearly three hours asking gentle questions.
all.zh: 朴老師到好奇心實驗室來看瑞秋最新的設備，待了快三個小時，溫和地問了好多問題。

all.en: He told her quietly that watching her teach was the proudest moment of his entire teaching career.
all.zh: 他靜靜地告訴她，看她教學是他整個教師生涯最驕傲的一刻。

all.en: Rachel decided to dedicate her next research paper entirely to him, written carefully in the margins of her oldest field notebook.
all.zh: 瑞秋決定把下一篇研究論文獻給他，仔細地寫在她最舊的那本田野筆記本的邊頁上。

all.en: On the final page, she added a small drawing of the very first plant she had once watered with plain tap water as a curious little girl.
all.zh: 在最後一頁，她加了一張小插圖，畫的是她小時候那個好奇的小女孩，曾用普通自來水澆過的第一棵植物。
